title: Article Views I
input_format: Table: Views with columns article_id (int), author_id (int), viewer_id (int), view_date (date)
output_format: Result table with column id containing author IDs who viewed their own articles, sorted by id in ascending order
constraints:
- There is no primary key for this table; it may have duplicate rows.
- Each row indicates that some viewer viewed an article on some date.
- Note that equal author_id and viewer_id indicate the same person.
